semantic.role: To define the architectural role, responsibilities, and boundaries of a specific component or subsystem within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Describing the component's architectural role and its position within the system
Listing the specific responsibilities and tasks the component handles
Defining the maintenance boundaries and out-of-scope items
Providing visual diagrams (Mermaid) to illustrate structure or flow
outOfScope: Detailed implementation instructions or code-level specifications

English.purpose: This document serves as the architectural specification for a component within the ArchSpine mirror system. It clearly defines what the component does, its role in the larger system architecture, and what is explicitly outside its scope of responsibility.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for system architects, developers, and maintainers who need to understand the component's boundaries, responsibilities, and integration points. It is also used by AI agents to reason about system structure and component interactions.
key_takeaways: The document establishes a clear architectural contract for the component
Responsibilities are explicitly listed to prevent scope creep
Out-of-scope items are defined to maintain clean boundaries
Mermaid diagrams provide visual context for the component's role

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档作为 ArchSpine 镜像系统中某个组件的架构规范。它清晰定义了该组件的职责、在整体系统架构中的角色，以及明确不属于其责任范围的内容。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向系统架构师、开发人员和维护者，帮助他们理解组件的边界、职责和集成点。同时，AI 代理也使用本文档来推理系统结构和组件间的交互关系。
key_takeaways: 文档为组件建立了清晰的架构契约
明确列出职责以防止范围蔓延
定义范围外事项以维护清晰的边界
Mermaid 图表为组件的角色提供可视化上下文
